title: Mechanical Bloom
content: The theme is “Mechanical Bloom.” The visuals should highlight the strengths of a video generation model in lighting and shadow, art direction detail, realism, camera movement, and cinematic character presence. The overall style should be that of a high-end technology brand commercial with strong visual impact. The video uses a continuous one-take macro push-in shot, beginning with a metal flower bud in darkness, gradually entering the intricate mechanical structure inside the petals, and culminating in the full bloom of the mechanical flower as light radiates outward. Requirements: realistic physical lighting, exquisite metal and glass materials, delicate mechanical motion, stable composition, cinematic color grading, and no subtitles.
